IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO BUILD HEALTHIER TOMORROWS AND STRONGER COMMUNITIES AROUND THE WORLD.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO BUILD HEALTHIER TOMORROWS AND STRONGER COMMUNITIES AROUND THE WORLD.
IRS990.Desc: ORACLE HEALTH FOUNDATION'S CASE GRANTS PROGRAM PROVIDES FUNDING FOR CHILDREN TO RECEIVE NEEDED CARE. THE GRANTS FILL THE GAPS IN ACCESS TO CARE. 412 GRANTS WERE MADE FROM 1.1.25 THROUGH 5.31.25 TO CHILDREN THROUGHOUT THE WORLD.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: ORACLE HEALTH FOUNDATION MAKES GRANTS TO OTHER NONPROFIT ORGANIZATIONS WITH THE RELATED MISSION OF DIRECTLY IMPACTING THE STATUS OF A YOUNG LIFE.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: THROUGH THE ORACLE HEALTH FOUNDATION CARE KITS PROGRAM, CHILDREN IN-NEED RECEIVED THEIR OWN BAGS OF AGE-APPROPRIATE PERSONAL ITEMS. 1,570 CARE KITS WERE DISTRIBUTED IN THE TIME PERIOD 1.1.25 THROUGH 5.31.25.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: PART II SECTION A LINE 1 COLUMN E
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: 2025: THIS COLUMN IS FOR SHORT-YEAR ENDED MAY 31, 2025.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FOLLOWING PROCEDURES ARE IN PLACE TO MONITOR THE USE OF FUNDING FOR INDIVIDUAL CASE EXPENSES. A DATABASE IS UTILIZED FOR ALL INFORMATION RELATED TO A GRANT REQUEST. THE APPLICATION INCLUDES CONSENT TO RELEASE INFORMATION AND AGREEMENT TO RETURN ANY UNUSED FUNDS IMMEDIATELY. SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS ARE REQUIRED, SUCH AS LETTERS FROM DOCTORS ON LETTERHEAD DETAILING THE DIAGNOSIS, HISTORY AND SPECIFIC REASONS FOR FUNDING, LETTER FROM SOCIAL WORKER IF REQUESTING DISPLACEMENT ASSISTANCE, DENIAL FROM INSURANCE COMPANY AND VERIFICATION OF INCOME. PHYSICIANS AND HOSPITALS ARE VERIFIED WITH INVESTIGATIONAL RESOURCES. STAFF MEMBERS REVIEW AND APPROVE FUNDING FOR CASES; STAFF REPORTS ARE USED TO SHOW THE AMOUNT OF APPROVED FUNDING FOR EACH REQUEST. AN OUTCOME SURVEY IS DONE FOR EACH CHILD THAT RECEIVES FUNDING TO ENSURE THAT BENEFITS ARE RECEIVED.

THE FOLLOWING PROCEDURES ARE IN PLACE TO MONITOR THE USE OF FUNDING FOR INDIVIDUAL CASE EXPENSES. A DATABASE IS UTILIZED FOR ALL INFORMATION RELATED TO A GRANT REQUEST. THE APPLICATION INCLUDES CONSENT TO RELEASE INFORMATION AND AGREEMENT TO RETURN ANY UNUSED FUNDS IMMEDIATELY. SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS ARE REQUIRED, SUCH AS LETTERS FROM DOCTORS ON LETTERHEAD DETAILING THE DIAGNOSIS, HISTORY AND SPECIFIC REASONS FOR FUNDING, LETTER FROM SOCIAL WORKER IF REQUESTING DISPLACEMENT ASSISTANCE, DENIAL FROM INSURANCE COMPANY AND VERIFICATION OF INCOME. PHYSICIANS AND HOSPITALS ARE VERIFIED WITH INVESTIGATIONAL RESOURCES. STAFF MEMBERS REVIEW AND APPROVE FUNDING FOR CASES; STAFF REPORTS ARE USED TO SHOW THE AMOUNT OF APPROVED FUNDING FOR EACH REQUEST. AN OUTCOME SURVEY IS DONE FOR EACH CHILD THAT RECEIVES FUNDING TO ENSURE THAT BENEFITS ARE RECEIVED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: MATT MAYERSON, COLLEEN CASSITY AND SHANNA ADAMIC HAVE BUSINESS RELATIONSHIPS AS THEY ALL WORK FOR ORACLE CORPORATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE 990 IS COMPLETED BY THE ORACLE HEALTH FOUNDATION (FKA FIRST HAND FOUNDATION) SENIOR ACCOUNTANT AND PROVIDED TO AN OUTSIDE TAX FIRM FOR REVIEW. ONCE THIS REVIEW HAS TAKEN PLACE, THE RETURN IS GIVEN TO THE TREASURER WHO SUBMITS THE RETURN TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS FOR FINAL APPROVAL AND SUBMISSION TO THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ORACLE HEALTH FOUNDATION (FKA FIRST HAND FOUNDATION) HAS A CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY. THE BOARD MEMBERS COMPLETE A CONFLICT OF INTEREST DISCLOSURE STATEMENT ANNUALLY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORACLE CORPORATION HUMAN RESOURCES DEPARTMENT DETERMINES THE APPROPRIATE COMPENSATION EMPLOYEES WHO PERFORM THE WORK OF THE FOUNDATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, POLICIES AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE GENERALLY AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
ORACLE HEALTH FOUNDATION CHANGED ITS FISCAL YEAR FROM DECEMBER 31 TO MAY 31. FORM 1128 WAS FILED WITH THE IRS. THIS RETURN IS FOR THE SHORT PERIOD JANUARY 1, 2025 THROUGH MAY 31, 2025.
